## Summary

PR #1360 implements the per-PR immutable scope declaration model (issue #1359). The primary
deliverable is the migration from a shared, merge-conflict-prone `SCOPE_DECLARATION.md` to
per-PR scope files at `.agent-admin/scope-declarations/pr-<PR_NUMBER>.md`.

**Scope of changes (10 files)**:
- `SCOPE_DECLARATION.md` and `governance/scope-declaration.md`: converted to static redirect docs
- `governance/canon/AGENT_HANDOVER_AUTOMATION.md` (v1.7.0): §4.3d gate updated with numeric
  field integrity check (Check 4b); §4.3e Check B migrated to per-PR scope file; AAP-04 updated
- `governance/canon/SCOPE_DECLARATION_SCHEMA.md` (v2.0.0): v2 required fields, FILES_CHANGED
  section, three-way consistency rule
- `governance/canon/scope-declaration.template.md` (v2.0.0): v2 per-PR format
- `.github/workflows/governance-scope-to-diff-gate.yml`: per-PR validation, merge-base diff,
  `grep -qxF` exact matching
- `.github/scripts/validate-scope-to-diff.sh`: per-PR path, merge-base diff, `grep -qxF`
- `.agent-admin/scope-declarations/README.md`: directory index (new)
- `.agent-admin/scope-declarations/pr-1360.md`: this PR's scope declaration (new)

**Governance quality confirmation**:
- CANON_INVENTORY.json updated: ✅
- Version bumps applied: ✅
- `pr-1360.md` matches actual `git diff --name-only origin/main...HEAD` (PASS): ✅
- All PR review feedback addressed (6 resolved threads): ✅
